subject: fix(dashboard): correct filter fallback, UTC date grouping, and nullish coalescing
body:
Three bugs found during tab-by-tab data usage audit:

1. Filter fallback to unfiltered data — SummaryTab, TimelineTab, ProgressTab
   used `commitsLoaded && filteredCommits.length > 0` which fell through to
   unfiltered summary data when filters excluded all commits. Changed to
   `commitsLoaded` so empty filter results show zeros, not stale totals.

2. || vs ?? in utils.js and DiscoverTab — getAdditions(), getDeletions(),
   getFilesChanged() used || which treats 0 as falsy. DiscoverTab had 9
   instances of `c.stats?.additions || 0`. All changed to ?? operator.

3. Local time vs UTC date grouping — TimelineTab and ProgressTab used
   substring(0, 10/7) for date/month keys (local timezone from ISO string),
   but pre-aggregated keys use UTC. Added getUTCDateKey()/getUTCMonthKey()
   helpers and applied in both tabs.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01RbDmv8obRPnToLezqSGmHg
title: correct filter fallback, UTC date grouping, and nullish coalescing
